eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN ADMINISTRATIVE MESSAGE for the following counties or areas: Maricopa, AZ; at 5:37 PM on SEP 20, 2019 Effective until 3:37 AM SEP 21, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: A Silver Alert has been issued for Glendale, Arizona Maricopa County.  This is the Arizona Department of Public Safety.  Glendale Police Department is looking for male, Walter Sears, last seen in the area of 53rd Avenue and Peoria driving a white 2010 Chevy Cobalt bearing a Arizona license plate of ANB6122.  Walter was last wearing a light blue long sleeve western shirt, blue jeans and white shoes. If you have contact with the Silver Alert, Please call 911.  Monitor TV and Radio for updates.
